nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 棕颈犀鸟
nodes.summary: 棕颈犀鸟（Rufous-necked hornbill，学名 Aceros nipalensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 温带阔叶混交林
nodes.summary: 温带阔叶混交林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括北美黑鸭、鬼鸮、林雕鸮等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pakke Tiger Reserve
nodes.summary: Pakke Tiger Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括棕颈犀鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |name-list-style=amp |year=2006 |title=A record of the Rufous-necked Hornbill Aceros nipalensis from West Bengal, India |journal=Indian Birds |volume=2 |issue=2 |pages=37–38 |url=http://indianbirds.in/pdfs/IB2.2_GhoseETAL_RNHornbill.pdf}} and Pakke Tiger Reserve. It predominantly inhabits ridged and hilly forests, primarily temperate broadleaf and mixed forests at elevations of , It has also been recorded in dry woodland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is locally extinct in Nepal due to hunting and significant loss of habitat. There are less than 10,000 adults left in the wild. With a length of about , it is among the largest Bucerotine hornbills
